F.सं. सा.का.िन.सं. सा.का.िन.सं. सा.का.िन.सं. सा.का.िन.सं. तारीख तारीख तारीख तारीख 1 603(अ) 06.09.2013 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th November, 2017 G.S.R. 1428(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Administrative Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Tripura, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:─ 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Second Amendment Regulations, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the Schedule, for the heading “Tripura” and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “TRIPURA Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 56 Chief Secretary to Government 1 Additional Chief Secretary to Government 1 Principal Secretary to Government 3 Director General , State Institute of Public Administration and Rural Development 1 -- 3 of 8 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Principal Secretary to Governor 1 Principal Resident Commissioner, Tripura Bhawan, New Delhi 1 Principal Secretary to Chief Minister 1 Secretary to Government 8 Chief Executive Officer, Tripura Tribal Areas Autonomous District Council 1 Resident Commissioner, Tripura 1 Commissioner for Departmental Inquiries 1 Secretary, Public Service Commission 1 Additional/Joint/Deputy Secretary to Govt. 8 District Magistrate & Collector 8 Director of Higher Education 1 Director of Secondary Education 1 Director of Vigilance 1 Director of Social Welfare & Social Education 1 Director of Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs 1 Director of Land Record & Settlement 1 Director of Information & Cultural Affairs 1 Registrar of Co-operative Societies 1 Labour Commissioner 1 Director, Youth Affairs & Sports 1 Director of Welfare for Scheduled Tribes 1 Director of Welfare for Scheduled Castes & OBC 1 Commissioner of Taxes & Excise 1 Director of Industries & Commerce 1 Director, Information Technology 1 Director of Handloom, Handicrafts & Sericulture 1 Director, Planning & Coordination 1 Director, Urban Development 1 Municipal Commissioner, Agartala Municipal Corporation 1 1 Total Senior Duty Posts 56 2 Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 40% of item 1 above 22 3 State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of item 1 above 14 4 Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of item 1 above 1 5 Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of Item 1 above 9 6 Posts to be filled by promotion under Rule 8 of the Indian Administrative Service (Recruitment) Rules, 1954 not exceeding 33 1/3% of Item 1, 2, 3 & 4 above 31 7 Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Items 1+2+3+4+5-6) 71 Total Authorised Strength 102” [F. No. 11031/10/2015-AIS-II (A)] JYOTSNA GUPTA, Under Secy. Note (1): Prior to issue of this notification, the Total Authorised Strength of Tripura Cadre was 96. Note (2): The principal regulations were published in the Gazette of India vide number SRO 3350 dated the 22nd October 1955 and subsequently amended in respect of the Tripura Cadre by the following GSR No. and date:─ Sl. "दनांक "दनांक "दनांक "दनांक 1. 1062 (अ) 10.11.2016 2. 1178(अ) 27.12.2016 3. 1194(अ) 30.12.2016 4. 575(अ) 12.06.2017 5. 1382(अ) 10.11.2017 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th November, 2017 G.S.R. 1429(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Tripura hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, namely: ─ 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Third Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, in Schedule II,– (a) in Part A relating to Posts carrying pay above the Senior Scale of pay of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Tripura” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “TRIPURA (1) Chief Secretary to Government Level 17 in the pay matrix (2) Additional Chief Secretary to Government Level 17 in the pay matrix (3) Principal Secretary to Government Level 15 in the pay matrix (4) Director General , State Institute of Public Administration and Rural Development Level 15 in the pay matrix (5) Principal Secretary to Governor Level 15 in the pay matrix (6) Principal Resident Commissioner, Tripura Bhawan, New Delhi Level 15 in the pay matrix (7) Principal Secretary to Chief Minister Level 15 in the pay matrix (8) Secretary to Government Level 14 in the pay matrix (9) Chief Executive Officer, Tripura Tribal Areas Autonomous District Council Level 14 in the pay matrix (10) Resident Commissioner, Tripura Level 14 in the pay matrix (11) Commissioner for Departmental Inquiries Level 14 in the pay matrix (b) in Part B relating to Posts carrying pay in the Senior Scale of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments including posts carrying Special Allowance in addition to pay, in the table for the entries occurring under Tripura the following shall be substituted,– -- 7 of 8 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] “TRIPURA (1) Secretary, Public Service Commission (2) Additional/Joint/Deputy Secretary to Govt. (3) District Magistrate & Collector (4) Director of Higher Education (5) Director of Secondary Education (6) Director of Vigilance (7) Director of Social Welfare & Social Education (8) Director of Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs (9) Director of Land Record & Settlement (10) Director of Information & Cultural Affairs (11) Registrar of Co-operative Societies (12) Labour Commissioner (13) Director, Youth Affairs & Sports (14) Director of Welfare for Scheduled Tribes (15) Director of Welfare for Scheduled Castes & OBC (16) Commissioner of Taxes & Excise (17) Director of Industries & Commerce (18) Director, Information Technology (19) Director of Handloom, Handicrafts & Sericulture (20) Director, Planning & Coordination (21) Director, Urban Development (22) Municipal Commissioner, Agartala Municipal Corporation ” [F. No. 11031/10/2015- AIS-II (B)] JYOTSNA GUPTA, Under Secy. Note:— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide number GSR 870 (E) dated the 08th September, 2016 and subsequently amended by the following GSR No. and date:- Sl.No. GSR No. Date 1. 1062 (E) 10.11.2016 2. 1178(E) 27.12.2016 3. 1194(E) 30.12.2016 4. 575(E) 12.06.2017 5. 1382(E) 10.11.2017 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054.
